case_title: RONNIE WASHINGTON VS. MIRIAM CARMEN BROWN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, RONNIE AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MIRIAM CARMEN DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-02-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-27-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-17-2003
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, RONNIE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO BY MAIL ON DECEMBER 9, 2002; DECLARATION RE DILIGENCE ATTACHED FILED BY PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, RONNIE SERVED DEC-08-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MIRIAM CARMEN
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BROWN, MIRIAM CARMEN
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, RONNIE JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUN-30-2003. MAY-02-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUL-10-2003.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR DAVID ROBERT VOGL.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JOSEPH A MORALES.
ARBITRATOR JOHN THOMAS PAYNE APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-11-2003 THROUGH OCT-09-2003.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-10-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE FILLED BY THE PLAINTIFF
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-10-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
